summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.selfdev; public class TrajectoryVector { private double modularity = 0.5; private double resilience = 0.5; private double architecturalDepth = 0.5; private double serviceOrientation = 0.5; private double persistence = 0.5; private double determinism = 0.5; private double extensibility = 0.5; private double coupling = 0.5; private double abstraction = 0.5; private double riskAcceptance = 0.5; public TrajectoryVector() {} public double distance(TrajectoryVector other) { if (other == null) return 1.0; double sum = 0.0; sum += Math.pow(this.modularity - other.modularity, 2); sum += Math.pow(this.resilience - other.resilience, 2); sum += Math.pow(this.architecturalDepth - other.architecturalDepth, 2); sum += Math.pow(this.serviceOrientation - other.serviceOrientation, 2);
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
